name: duplicate-key-rejection
notes: Proposed by seritalien (Vauban Pay). JSON RFC 8259 Section 4 admits duplicate keys with parser-dependent behavior. Last-wins vs first-wins produce different canonical bytes. This vector uses agent_id 'agent-a' which differs from the baseline 'agent-7', so the digest does not match. Verifiers MUST reject duplicate-key inputs at parse before canonicalization. The raw duplicate-key input (not representable in standard JSON) would be: agent_id appears twice with values agent-a and agent-b.
